policy.semver: Package minor/patch may tighten validation and add optional binding keys. Major package bumps are required for breaking runtime schema or tool-name changes.
policy.contract_version_freeze: The string zto-webmcp-v1 identifies the six-module catalog. A new catalog (added/removed/renamed modules or changed permitted ops) MUST bump to zto-webmcp-v2 (or later) and must not silently reinterpret v1 assignments.
policy.no_seventh_module: Task-specific behavior is expressed only as validated bindings and mechanics_exclusions. Custom JSON Schema and task-private modules are forbidden.
